calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Continued To Dec-14-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Altonomy Holdings Pte. Ltd.?S Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion To Seal First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALTONOMY PTE. LTD.'S Motion And Unopposed Motion To Seal First Amended Complaint.

Granted. The motion is unopposed and good cause shown.

Order is signed

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Plaintiff Imperii Partners Llc?S Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-04-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
KAIYI A. XIE, Esq., KEKER, VAN NEST & PETERS LLP, 415 391 5400, kxie@keker.com, for Defendant
ALTONOMY HOLDINGS PTE. LTD.
No other appearances.

Matter is not contested. Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF IMPERII PARTNERS LLC'S Motion To Seal Complaint.

Plaintiff's "motion to seal first amended complaint" is denied without prejudice; the notice of motion fails to adequately specify what is advocated to be sealed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Plaintiff Imperii Partners Llc' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF IMPERII PARTNERS LLC'S Motion To Seal Complaint.

Plaintiff Imperii Partners LLC's ("Imperii") unopposed motion to seal complaint is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order that tracks the Court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
